title: ProjectE Integration
description: A mod that maps recipes to EMC calculations for ProjectE from other mods.
body:
## [Supported Mods](https://hackmd.io/@TagnumElite/PEI_ModList)

## Description:

ProjectE Integration integrates items, fluids, blocks and recipes from other mods to have EMC by default or through recipes into ProjectE.

For example, Immersive Engineering workbench will allow vacuum tubes to have emc thought the blueprint recipe.

Report issues or give suggestions on [github here](https://github.com/TagnumElite/ProjectE-Integration/issues/new/choose).

### Lore:

The original mod that inspired all of this was [Expanded Equivalence](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/expanded-equivalence). I wanted support for more mods and wanted it done without core modding. Thus PEI was born.

### Permissions

You can use the code for anything you want, it is under a [MIT License](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/). If you use this code for any malicious purpose then I will have it removed.
